description: Ingestion adapter and deduplication pipeline contract.
ingestion_run_rule: A workspace ingestion run selects enabled workspace_source_links, executes the registered adapters, persists raw_items idempotently, and records run-level source success/failure plus raw created/updated counts. Schedulers and workers must call this same service layer instead of bypassing adapters.
adapter_rule: Each source type may have its own input structure, but every adapter must persist the full raw payload and emit canonical raw_items. Normalization enriches and maps fields; it must not discard the original payload.

dedupe_stage.reason: Different source structures must first be normalized before they can be compared fairly. Scoring should only run on deduped winners.
dedupe_stage.workspace_scope_rule: dedupe_groups are unique by workspace_code + dedupe_key. Shared raw_items may be normalized independently into each enabled workspace, and each workspace owns its own winner/loser state.
hard_dedupe_key_order: normalized_title + published_date_bucket when canonical_url is missing
canonical_url_rules: remove tracking query params such as utm_*, spm, ref, ref_src, fbclid, gclid
representative_selection_order: source_kind priority: wiseflow gets legacy bonus because it may contain richer crawled material

result_fields.loser: active = false, duplicate_of = winner.id or winner.candidate_key
result_fields.all_items: raw_items remain preserved; dedupe never deletes raw records

recommendation_stage.current_api: POST /api/pipeline/daily-runs for full pipeline; POST /api/recommendation/runs for recommendation-only reruns
recommendation_stage.candidate_rule: Only active dedupe winners from the requested workspace and target day_key can enter a recommendation run. Losers remain traceable but are not recommended directly.
recommendation_stage.day_key_rule: Daily recommendation filters candidates by (news_items.published_at or created_at) in Asia/Shanghai. Freshness scoring for backfill uses the target day end instead of the wall-clock current day.
writes: daily_reports and daily_report_items when create_daily_draft is true
recommendation_stage.lineage_rule: generated_news.content_json.source must preserve news_item_id, raw_item_id and data_source_id so adopted daily report items can be traced back to raw_items.raw_payload_json.
recommendation_stage.adoption_rule: Recommendation creates draft daily_report_items with adoption_status = 2 for selected items. Editors may later change adoption_status on daily_report_items; news_items and raw_items are never overwritten.
recommendation_stage.workspace_scope_rule: Daily reports are unique by workspace_code + domain_code + day_key so multiple workspaces can generate same-day reports independently.

generator_stage.current_provider: MiniMax China OpenAI-compatible chat/completions at MINIMAX_BASE_URL or default https://api.minimaxi.com/v1 when MINIMAX_GENERATION_ENABLED=true and MINIMAX_API_KEY is set; deterministic rule_v1 fallback otherwise
generator_stage.provider_rule: Model output must be strict JSON and category must be one of the workspace label policy primary labels. Source trace IDs are forced by backend after generation.
generator_stage.fallback_rule: LLM failure must not abort the daily pipeline; selected recommendations still generate rule_v1 drafts.

scheduled_daily_pipeline.rule: The scheduled job must call the same service functions as the manual APIs. It must not bypass adapter, normalization, dedupe or recommendation contracts.

soft_clustering_stage.purpose: Group same-topic items across different URLs without automatically deleting them.
soft_clustering_stage.rule: Soft clusters support editor review and weekly aggregation; they do not replace hard dedupe in phase 1.
